criteria.name: All existing DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx tests pass without modification
criteria.evidence: Executor ran `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` in T4/T9, and the current file still contains the pre-existing registry tests with only additive audio cases.

criteria.name: Compiled effects that do NOT call useAudioReactive() work identically to before (verified by existing test suite passing)
criteria.evidence: T9 reports the full video-editor suite passed (`29` files, `105` tests). That covers existing effect compilation and registry behavior outside the new audio hooks.

criteria.name: useAudioReactive() returns zeroed/silent AudioAnalysisData when no AudioAnalysisProvider exists in the tree (verified by unit test)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/effects/useAudioReactive.test.ts` asserts `useAudioReactive()` returns `SILENT_AUDIO_DATA` outside a provider.

criteria.name: useAudioReactive() returns frame-synchronized audio data indexed by useCurrentFrame() when provider is present (verified by unit test)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/effects/useAudioReactive.test.ts` mocks `useCurrentFrame()` and verifies frame index `1` returns the second analysis frame from context.

criteria.name: useAudioParam(binding) resolves an AudioBindingValue to an interpolated number using current audio data (verified by unit test)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/effects/useAudioReactive.ts` uses plain arithmetic, and `useAudioReactive.test.ts` verifies `{source:'bass',min:2,max:6}` resolves to `3` when bass is `0.25`.

criteria.name: wrapWithEffect and wrapWithClipEffects in effects/index.tsx are not modified (verified by diff)
criteria.evidence: Scoped `git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/effects/index.tsx` was empty in executor evidence, and current `src/tools/video-editor/effects/index.tsx` shows no audio-related prop plumbing or wrapper changes.

criteria.name: EffectComponentProps type does not gain audio-related props (verified by diff)
criteria.evidence: Current `src/tools/video-editor/effects/entrances.tsx` still defines `EffectComponentProps` as `{ children, durationInFrames, effectFrames?, intensity?, params? }` with no audio props, and the file is absent from the diff summary.

criteria.name: ParameterType union includes 'audio-binding' in both frontend types/index.ts AND supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts` and `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` both include `'audio-binding'` in `ParameterType`.

criteria.name: validateAndCoerceParams correctly validates audio-binding values and does NOT fall through to the color branch (verified by unit test)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/effects/validateParams.ts` has an explicit `audio-binding` branch before the final color fallback, and `src/tools/video-editor/effects/audioBindingParams.test.tsx` verifies valid bindings pass while invalid ones fall back to defaults.

criteria.name: effectPromptTemplate.ts documents useAudioReactive() and useAudioParam() with return types and usage examples
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/effects/effectPromptTemplate.ts` documents both globals and includes frequency/beat/amplitude/parameter-binding examples.

criteria.name: supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts AVAILABLE_GLOBALS includes useAudioReactive and useAudioParam
criteria.evidence: `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` exports `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS` containing both hooks, and `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.test.ts` asserts both strings are present.

criteria.name: AudioAnalysisProvider calls delayRender() on mount and continueRender() when analysis completes (verified by integration test)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/AudioAnalysisProvider.tsx` acquires the handle via `useState(() => delayRender('Audio analysis'))` and releases with `continueRender(handle)` only; `AudioAnalysisProvider.test.tsx` verifies `delayRender`/`continueRender` behavior and asserts `cancelRender` is never called.

criteria.name: AudioAnalysisProvider wraps the composition in TimelineRenderer.tsx
criteria.evidence: Current `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/TimelineRenderer.tsx` wraps the outer `AbsoluteFill` tree in `<AudioAnalysisProvider clips={audioClips} fps={fps} totalDurationInFrames={totalDurationInFrames}>`.

criteria.name: SyntheticAudioProvider is placed inside makePreviewComposition()'s returned component, not around the Player element
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx` builds preview `content` first and returns it inside `<SyntheticAudioProvider ...>{content}</SyntheticAudioProvider>` from `EffectPreviewComposition`.

criteria.name: Edge function tests (ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts) pass with updated templates
criteria.evidence: T9 reports `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/` passed (`2` files, `7` tests). Current `index.test.ts` also contains the logger/fireworks harness needed for the green run.

criteria.name: No new Remotion packages added — uses Web Audio API and existing remotion delayRender/continueRender only
criteria.evidence: No `package.json` or lockfile changes appear in the diff summary. Implementation uses `OfflineAudioContext` plus existing `remotion` exports `delayRender`/`continueRender`.

criteria.name: AudioAnalysisProvider file is under ~300 lines (FFT helper can be a separate utility)
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/AudioAnalysisProvider.tsx` is 387 lines, above the target. Quality target missed literally, but the implementation is cohesive and functionally correct; this is a non-blocking maintainability gap.

criteria.name: Beat detection uses energy-threshold with cooldown to avoid false positives
criteria.evidence: `analyzeMixedBuffer()` computes a rolling bass average, requires `bass > rollingAverage * 1.5`, and enforces `beatCooldownFrames = ceil(fps * 0.3)` before another beat can fire.

criteria.name: Audio analysis is pre-computed (offline) for deterministic rendering
criteria.evidence: `analyzeAudioClips()` decodes sources, mixes them with `OfflineAudioContext`, calls `startRendering()`, then analyzes the rendered buffer into frame-indexed data before exposing it through context.

criteria.name: Audio-binding parameter UI shows source selector and min/max range controls
criteria.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/components/ParameterControls.tsx` renders a source `Select` and two `NumberInput` controls for min/max, and `audioBindingParams.test.tsx` verifies the UI renders those controls.

criteria.name: Manual smoke test: create a custom effect using useAudioReactive() in the effect creator, preview shows movement with synthetic audio
criteria.evidence: Manual runtime QA was not performed in this review context.

criteria.name: Manual smoke test: add audio track to timeline, apply audio-reactive continuous effect, playback shows effect responding to actual audio
criteria.evidence: Manual runtime QA was not performed in this review context.

summary: Approved. All must criteria pass. The settled gate decisions were implemented correctly: audio data flows through context/hooks rather than props, preview uses an in-composition SyntheticAudioProvider, `useAudioParam()` resolves bindings at runtime with plain arithmetic, the audio-binding UI uses `NumberInput` controls instead of a range slider, and `AudioAnalysisProvider` follows the correct Remotion delay/continue pattern without `cancelRender`. The only notable gap is that `AudioAnalysisProvider.tsx` exceeds the soft line-count target.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. The scoped type changes match the repo state: `audio-binding` was added to the frontend type union, `AudioBindingValue` is exported, and parameter defaults now accept object bindings.

Pass. `AudioAnalysisProvider` implements offline mixing/analysis, exposes context and silent fallback data, uses `delayRender` via `useState`, and cleans up with `continueRender` only. The file is larger than the target, but the functional requirements are met.
Pass. `useAudioReactive()` reads context with a graceful fallback and `useAudioParam()` resolves bindings with direct arithmetic instead of `interpolate`.
Pass. `compileEffect.tsx` injects `useAudioReactive` and `useAudioParam` into both the `new Function()` signature and the factory call, and registry tests cover the new globals.
Pass. Both prompt-template surfaces were updated to describe the new globals, and the edge template now includes the `audio-binding` parameter type.
Pass. Validation has an explicit audio-binding branch, and the parameter UI uses a source selector plus two `NumberInput` fields, matching the settled design decision.
Pass. `TimelineRenderer` now provides audio analysis context to the composition tree, while `effects/index.tsx` remained untouched.
Pass. Preview wiring is correct: `SyntheticAudioProvider` lives inside `makePreviewComposition()` and no audio props were added to panel callers.

Pass. The added tests cover hook behavior, compiled-effect audio globals, audio-binding validation/UI, provider lifecycle, and direct template smoke coverage. Executor evidence reports both the full video-editor and edge-function vitest modules green.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. Frontend types export `AudioBindingValue`, include `'audio-binding'`, and widen parameter defaults.
Confirmed. `AudioAnalysisProvider` uses `useState(() => delayRender(...))`, never calls `cancelRender`, and has the empty-clips silent fast path.
Confirmed. `useAudioReactive()` uses context fallback semantics, and `useAudioParam()` uses plain arithmetic and returns `0` for nullish bindings.
Confirmed. Audio hooks are the 7th and 8th injected globals in both the `new Function()` constructor and factory invocation, and registry tests cover them.
Confirmed. Both prompt templates document the audio globals, and the edge template includes the `audio-binding` type.
Confirmed. `validateAndCoerceParams()` has the explicit audio-binding branch before color fallback, and `ParameterControls` uses `NumberInput` controls for min/max.
Confirmed. `TimelineRenderer` wraps the composition with `AudioAnalysisProvider`, and `effects/index.tsx` remains unchanged.
Confirmed. `SyntheticAudioProvider` is inside the returned preview composition component, not around the Remotion `Player`.
Confirmed. New tests exist for hooks/provider/params/templates, the direct `templates.ts` smoke test is present, and executor evidence shows both full vitest modules passing.
